    Method
    Description

    StoreManager.addToy()

  • Uses of CustomException in mru.store.model

    Methods in mru.store.model that throw CustomException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BoardGames.setMaxPlayerCount(int maxPlayerCount)
    This method sets the maximum amount of players for a board game and throws a custom exception if the max player count is less than the minimum.
    void
    Toy.setToyPrice(double toyPrice)
    This method sets the toys price and checks to make sure it's not negative.
